input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.9.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.9.1
            TITLE: each vehicle must have two master switches that must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.9.1: Each vehicle must have two Master Switches that must:
EV.7.9.1 Each vehicle must have two Master Switches that must: 
a. Meet T.9.3 for Configuration and Location  
b. Be direct acting, not act through a relay or logic
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 105 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Each vehicle must have two Master Switches that must: a. Meet T.9.3 for Configuration and Location b. Be direct acting, not act through a relay or logic
